title: pyrus calleryana var. calleryana
intro: Pyrus calleryana var. calleryana, also known as the Callery pear, is a deciduous tree native to China that has been naturalized in many parts of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pyrus calleryana var. calleryana include its ability to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to create teas and tonics for various health benefits.
